name: Type-Ahead
summary: Keyboard type-ahead navigation for listboxes, menus, selects, and trees: buffer typed characters, move focus to the matching item, then reset after an idle timeout. Moves focus — never filters.

ariaApgKeyboard.pattern: Type-ahead / first-character navigation across the Listbox, Menu, Combobox, and Tree patterns
ariaApgKeyboard.adoption: Buffer printable keys, move focus (or aria-activedescendant) to the matching item; reset after idle timeout

htmlSelectTypeAhead.adoption: Mirror the platform default a custom listbox/menu would otherwise lose

keyboardEventKey.adoption: Match single-character, non-modifier keys; ignore Arrow/Enter/Tab and modifier chords

typeahead-match.description: Fired when the buffer matches an item and focus moves to it

typeahead-nomatch.description: Fired when the buffer matches no item (focus is unchanged)

typeahead-reset.description: Fired when the character buffer is cleared after the idle timeout

moveFocusNotFilter.description: Type-ahead moves focus to an existing item; it never removes or hides items.
moveFocusNotFilter.rationale: Distinguishes the pattern from combobox autocomplete/filtering (aria-autocomplete='list'); preserves the full item set and mirrors the native <select> behavior.

resetTimeout.description: The accumulated character buffer clears after an idle timeout, defaulting to 500ms.
resetTimeout.rationale: Matches the WAI-ARIA APG recommendation and native <select> convention; configurable via type-ahead-reset.

behaviorComposition.description: Implemented as a CustomAttribute behavior attached to an existing container, composing with Composite Widget rather than absorbing it.
behaviorComposition.rationale: Roving-tabindex / aria-activedescendant focus management is orthogonal — type-ahead only decides WHICH item should receive focus and delegates the actual focus move when a composite-widget container is present.

traits.name: withPrefixMatching
traits.description: Accumulate typed characters into a prefix buffer and match item labels by prefix

traits.name: withSameLetterCycling
traits.description: A repeated single key cycles focus through items starting with that character

traits.name: withWrapAround
traits.description: Wrap focus to the start of the collection when matching passes the last item

traits.name: withTimeoutReset
traits.description: Clear the character buffer after an idle timeout (default 500ms)
